projects.title: Flavor da Casa
projects.description: A full-stack restaurant reservation management system built with Spring Boot and Clean Architecture. Features event scheduling, seating management, dining tables, menu configuration, guest reservations with email confirmations, and a REST API layer, all managed through Jira Sprints.

features.title: Clean Architecture
features.desc: Four-layer separation: Domain, Application, Infrastructure, and Presentation with strict dependency rules

features.title: Reservation Workflow
features.desc: Multi-step guest reservations with event/seating selection, validation, and UUID-based confirmation

features.title: REST API
features.desc: API controllers exposing events, menus, and reservations as JSON endpoints for external consumption

features.title: Jira-Managed Sprints
features.desc: Planned and tracked with user stories, subtasks, and a structured Git branching strategy

projects.title: UniCycle Marketplace
projects.description: A campus-verified online marketplace where university students can buy, sell, and trade items within a trusted community. Built solo using the Rational Unified Process (RUP) methodology with full authentication and image uploads.

features.title: Campus-Verified Auth
features.desc: Secure registration and login with bcrypt password hashing and express-session management

features.title: Listing Management
features.desc: Students create, browse, and manage product listings with image uploads via Multer

features.title: RUP Methodology
features.desc: Developed following Rational Unified Process with iterative phases and structured documentation

projects.title: Campus Bites
projects.description: A student recipe-sharing platform with role-based access control, content moderation workflow, and image security. Built with ASP.NET Core MVC and a team of developers following Agile practices.

features.title: Role-Based Security
features.desc: Three-tier access: Anonymous visitors, Registered Users, and Administrators

features.title: Approval Workflow
features.desc: Recipes flow through Draft → Pending → Published with admin-gated approval

features.title: Image Security
features.desc: Uploaded images segregated and replaced with placeholders until admin verification

projects.title: TriviaQuest
projects.description: A real-time multiplayer trivia quiz game built with WebSockets for a Networking for Programmers course. Players compete head-to-head with configurable categories, difficulty levels, and live leaderboards.

features.title: Real-Time Multiplayer
features.desc: Socket.io WebSocket connections for instant question delivery, answer tracking, and live scoring

features.title: Live Leaderboard
features.desc: Dynamic player ranking with medal system, score tracking, and game-over summary

features.title: Configurable Settings
features.desc: Players choose trivia category, difficulty level, and number of rounds before starting

projects.title: Developer Portfolio
projects.description: This website, a data-driven SPA built with vanilla JavaScript, Handlebars templating, and JSON data files. Features URL-param routing, system-aware dark mode, and a clean MVC-like architecture.

features.title: SPA Architecture
features.desc: URL-param based routing with dynamic Handlebars template compilation and JSON data separation

features.title: System-Aware Theming
features.desc: Dark/light toggle that follows OS preferences and respects user session overrides
